description: The Zephyr lands on Kitson, and Daisy, Simmons, and Piper search for Fitz and Enoch by interrogating the crooks who stole their ship. Davis, meanwhile, innocently takes some alien 'puffies'—hallucinogenic sweets—and shares them with Daisy and Simmons. The team learns their friends are likely at either the casino or brothel, setting out accordingly—unaware that they're now under the influence of drugs.
location: Kitson (alien casino planet / House of Games)

transcript.line: It's someone trying to contact the ship. Before anybody realizes what happened, we'll be living like kings on the unsullied shores of Leitner.
I'm the Controller of this ship, and you're trespassing.
Okay, everybody just suck on some calm.
We're looking for this man. He was on this ship.
Oh? What's it worth to, uh... Aah! Aah!
What are your bones worth to you, ‘cause I'll break every single one of them until you start talking.

H-How did you... Okay! Okay... W-We didn't hurt him or do anything wrong. We just... They're outlaws. We could have turned them in, but we didn't. We just took their ship and let them go 'cause we're nice.
Yeah, that... ah, that guy and his friend, some creepy bald dude.
Enoch. Fitz... he's here and not alone.
Do you guys need anything else?
Those. They're all yours. They look really good. Oh, my God. So good. Take some. Food.
On this planet, it could be one of two places the casino or the brothels, depending on how well they did at the casino.
